description_long: This object is a classic revolver-style firearm with a long, cylindrical barrel and a wooden grip. The frame and barrel are metallic, with a silver-gray finish, while the cylinder and trigger guard are brass-colored, giving it a vintage appearance. The grip is made of polished wood, smoothly contoured for ergonomic handling. The trigger and hammer are visibly metallic, and the trigger guard is rounded and slightly elongated. The barrel is long and straight, with a small front sight at the muzzle. The overall design is reminiscent of 19th-century percussion cap revolvers, commonly seen in historical or Western urban settings.
description: A vintage revolver-style firearm with a long metallic barrel, brass cylinder, and polished wooden grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, wooden grip, brass cylinder, and metallic frame.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the barrel and cylinder.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden grip, brass cylinder, and metallic barrel from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip, the width of the cylinder, and the hammer.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and straight with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded and elongated, medium size, no finger grooves or reinforcement
